zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Botreaux於1412年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾海斯波利時，她的父親William Botreaux 3rd Baron Botreaux23歲，母親Elizabeth de Beaumont23歲。她和Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford至少有3個兒子和6個女兒。她去世於1478年2月7日在英國享年66歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里 馮 克洛斯 本 馮 卡農斯 本 馮 凱德拉爾 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Botreaux was born in 1412, in Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Botreaux 3rd Baron Botreaux, was 23 and her mother, Elizabeth de Beaumont, was 23. She had at least 3 sons and 6 daughters with Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford. She died on 7 February 1478, in England, at the age of 66, and was buried in Salisbury the Close of the Canons of the Cathedral Church, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Botreaux est née en 1412, à Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Botreaux 3rd Baron Botreaux, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Beaumont, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles avec Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford. Elle est décédée le 7 février 1478, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Salisbury the Close of the Canons of the Cathedral Church, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

Sie hatte mit Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. Februar 1478 im Alter von 66 Jahren in England und wurde in Salisbury the Close of the Canons of the Cathedral Church, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Botreaux è nata il nel 1412 nel Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Botreaux 3rd Baron Botreaux, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Beaumont, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie con Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford. Morì il 7 febbraio 1478, nel England, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Salisbury the Close of the Canons of the Cathedral Church, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Botreauxが1412年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアヘイテスブリーで生まれた時，父William Botreaux 3rd Baron Botreauxは23歳，母Elizabeth de Beaumontは23歳であった。彼女はSir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerfordとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1478年2月7日にイギリスで66歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリー ス クロゼ オフ ス カノンス オフ ス カスエドラル チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Salisbury the Close of the Canons of the: 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이 테 클로스 프 테 캔스 프 테 캐테드럴 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Botreaux(이)가 1412년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 헤이츠버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Botreaux 3rd Baron Botreaux(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Beaumont(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1478년 2월 7일 영국에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이 테 클로스 프 테 캔스 프 테 캐테드럴 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Botreaux nasceu em 1412, em Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Botreaux 3rd Baron Botreaux, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Beaumont, tinha 23 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas com Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford. Ela faleceu em 7 de fevereiro de 1478, em Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Salisbury the Close of the Canons of the Cathedral Church, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Botreaux родилась в 1412 г. в местности хитсбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Botreaux 3rd Baron Botreaux было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Beaumont, 23. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей от Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford. Она умерла 7 февраля 1478 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности салисбури т клос оф т канонс оф т кэтедраль чурч, уилцхир, Англия.
